title: olearia racemosa
intro: Olearia racemosa, also known as the white daisy bush, is a flowering plant native to Australia, commonly found in the eastern regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Olearia racemosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Olearia racemosa is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
